preTitle:
A long time ago, in a galaxy far,
far away....
title: STAR WARS
subtitle: Episode IX
crawlBody:
It is a period of great celebration. Young JAKE, hero of the Thornton household, has survived another year of incredible adventures.

During the battle against bedtime, rebel forces managed to stay up until TEN O'CLOCK — a new record in the Outer Rim territories of the living room sofa.

Pursued by the evil forces of HOMEWORK and EARLY MORNINGS, Jake races home aboard his trusty bicycle, custodian of the stolen plans that could save his summer holidays and restore freedom to the galaxy.

May the Force be with you, Jake. Happy Birthday!
